caption: In a professional conference room setting, five people are gathered around a light-colored wooden table. A man stands at the head of the table, wearing a dark grey suit, a white shirt, and a patterned purple tie, gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. Seated at the table is a man in a white dress shirt and purple tie, leaning his chin on his hand, and a woman in a purple turtleneck. In the foreground, a woman in a green cardigan over a purple top rests her arms on the table. To her left, the back of another person's head is visible. On the table, there is a white disposable cup and a pink mug. Throughout the sequence, the man standing continues his gesture and speech, while the seated individuals remain mostly still, listening attentively. The lighting is consistent, and there are no changes in the scene's composition or visible text.
